title: Media, Connectors, Transceivers, and Architectures · Protocol Clinic: Net Wireless Cellular Satellite
summary: Select and document a campus and data-center physical design under distance, bandwidth, environment, and redundancy constraints. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net wireless cellular satellite increment in a physical media and topology bill of design. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compare 802.11, cellular, and satellite media by coverage, latency, capacity, interference, mobility, and cost.
Compare single-mode and multimode fiber, wavelengths, distance, bandwidth, bend, contamination, and safety concerns.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
